race.comment: BLUEPRINT (7) built on a nice second two starts back at Ipswich with success over 1800m at Sunshine Coast a week-and-a-half ago, getting home by a nose. Frederick Larson scored on him last time and retains the ride. Finds an easier assignment and can get the job done again. PARISIENNE PIPER (6) started favourite last time but found one better over 1460m at Esk. Will appreciate the extra ground and is sure to run well. BATTLESPACE (5) was prominent at the bend and finished second last time over 1600m at Gatton when resuming from a spell, beaten 1.4 lengths. Will trim down second-up. Placed to advantage so expect another forward showing. MONTEVECCHIO (1) improved sharply last start to crack his maiden over 2200m at Ipswich. Don't underestimate.
